gates.name: leakage_check
gates.threshold: no game_pk overlap between train (2015-2022) and test (2023-2024)
gates.measured: disjoint season ranges enforced by --train-start 2015 --train-end 2022 --test-start 2023 --test-end 2024; baseline script performs in-memory split on extracted PA-level data

gates.name: ci_coverage
gates.source: results/ci_coverage*.json (not present; informational gate skipped per skill spec)

notes: Leakage check satisfied by disjoint season ranges (train 2015-2022, test 2023-2024); baseline_comparison.py extracts PA-level data per range and performs in-memory split, so no game_pk overlap is possible. Pitcher cohort is empty (n=0) in this run; combined metrics equal batter metrics (n=574). Test nuisance R2=0.0007 (test) vs train R2=0.0009 (train), reported per Ticket 1 spec. Informational CI-coverage gate skipped (no results/ci_coverage*.json present).
